settings.widgetDesc: Add a "Days Together" counter to your home screen.
settings.widgetIos: Long-press your home screen → tap the "+" button → search for "WeDo" → select the widget size → tap "Add Widget."
settings.widgetAndroid: Long-press your home screen → tap "Widgets" → find "WeDo Days Together" → drag it onto your home screen.
settings.widgetPremiumNote: Premium themes are applied to your widget automatically.
settings.signOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
